title: Function Design Specification Schema
description: Schema for MDC Core function design specification documents, defining the structure for cybersecurity, sentinel mode, startup/OS, AI framework, CAN communication, MCU, and CI/CD functional requirements

id.description: Bundle identifier, uniquely identifies the entire specification document bundle (format: bundle-{UUID})

type.description: Document type identifier, indicates this is a bundle type document containing multiple function design specifications

x_domain_tag.description: Domain tag for categorizing and versioning the specification data, follows platform data naming convention

objects.description: Array of function design specification objects, each representing a specific functional requirement or capability

function_model_name.description: Name of the main function model/domain, categorizes the high-level functional area (e.g., '网络安全', '哨兵模式', '启动与操作系统', '支持智能驾驶应用', 'CAN 通信', 'MCU', '持续集成')

sub_function_model_name.description: Name of the sub-function model, provides more granular classification within the main function domain, typically describes specific feature or capability
examples: MDC 平台支持 ADS 哨兵模式接入功能_MDC630/830 适配
AI 框架与算子功能域

id.description: Unique identifier for the function design specification object (format: x-function-design-spec-{UUID})

type.description: Object type identifier, indicates this is a custom function design specification type

description.description: Detailed description of the functional requirement, including technical specifications, implementation details, use cases, and security considerations. Contains comprehensive information about what the function does, how it works, and any relevant constraints or dependencies

x_domain_tag.description: Domain tag for the individual specification object, matches the bundle-level domain tag for consistency
